next_step.current_state: Foundry is likely the noisy server because its canonical cast record describes it as a loud lab box, but the file does not contain a birthday/DoB field. It only shows created_on and commissioned_on. Rulebook says if canonical file does not show needed fact, ask for clarification instead of guessing.

next_step.observation: Read 10_entities/cast/foundry.md and found it describes a loud lab box with created_on 2026-03-23 and commissioned_on 2025-10-19, but no birthday/DoB field.

function.message: I found the likely 'noisy server' record, but its canonical file does not state a DoB. Please clarify whether you want its created_on date (23-03-2026) or commissioned_on date (19-10-2025).
function.rulebook_notes: Root AGENTS.MD says entity files in 10_entities/cast are authoritative for birthdays when present, and if the relevant canonical file does not show the needed fact, ask for clarification instead of guessing.
function.outcome_justification: The authoritative canonical record 10_entities/cast/foundry.md identifies the loud lab server but contains no DoB/birthday field, only created_on and commissioned_on dates, so returning one as DoB would require guessing.
